examples: The Guggenheim Museum's design is based on a spiral.
In 1959, when the Guggenheim Museum opened, traffic on Fifth Avenue moved in both directions.
Andre Kikoski also has upcoming projects at the Guggenheim Museum and the Museum for African Art.
She lies to him about getting to Guggenheim to go work on her play.
Mr. HOFFMAN: (As Jon Savage) A friend of mine does some consulting for the Guggenheim Foundation.
